mapper.insert: INSERT INTO prplchecktask (checklongitude, checklatitude, checkdate, checksite) VALUES (#{checklongitude}, #{checklatitude}, #{checkdate}, #{checksite})
mapper.update: UPDATE prplchecktask SET checklongitude = #{checklongitude}, checklatitude = #{checklatitude}, checkdate = #{checkdate}, checksite = #{checksite} WHERE id = #{id}
